reviews.comment:
Estuvimos al sábado 15 de julio por la tarde y nos atendieron maravillosamente bien. Las dos chicas muy amables y simpáticas. El café riquísimo. Nos olvidamos una campera con documentos, celular, etc.. La guardaron y trataron de ubicarnos con el celular. Una atención y honestidad dignas de destacar.

(Translated by Google)
We were there on Saturday, July 15th, in the afternoon and received wonderful service. The two women were very kind and friendly. The coffee was delicious. We forgot a jacket with documents, cell phone, etc. They kept it safe and tried to contact us using the phone. Their service and honesty were truly remarkable.

reviewReply.comment: Silvina. Nos alegra recibir su mensaje.  Día a día trabajamos con nuestro equipo para brindarles lo mejor a nuestro clientes.  Saludos
